content.full_text:
City of
FRESNO

Harvey Wallace
City Attorney

March 8, 1991

Jonathan Rothman, Esq.
State of California
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

RE:  Potential Conflict of Interest
     Item before the Fresno City Planning Commission

As you recall, I contacted your office on March 5, 1991 to seek
your advise as to a potential conflict of interest issue. As
explained, I am the legal advisor for the Fresno City Planning
Commission. The commission was holding a meeting on March 6, 1990
to consider the approval of a conditional use permit for a water
well located approximately 1500 feet from my personal residence.
Although I will be served directly from the new well, it was
questionable whether or not I would receive substantially improved
services.

You had referenced FPPC Regulation 18702.3(2) and 18702.3(3) and
concluded that no conflict of interest was present. In the
unlikely event that my participation in the Planning Commission
meeting and respective Conditional Use Permit were ever called
into question, you've kindly agreed to draft a letter to formalize
your verbal response to my inquiry.

Thank you for all your help in this matter.

Debra M. Hight
Deputy City Attorney

DMH:cmc
978p/726

City Hall • Fresno, California 93721 • (209) 498-1326 • FAX (209) 488-1084
